ops.title: OpenAI Codex hit its usage limit 2026-07-14; all codex lanes (review/refuter/security/bounded-impl) fail with exit 1 until ~2026-07-19 23:10 PT — route those lanes to fable/opus meanwhile
ops.body:
On 2026-07-14 a codex finder pass failed: `codex-ask` exit 1 with "You've hit
your usage limit … try again at Jul 19th, 2026 11:10 PM." Every gpt-5.6-sol
lane in the Models table (diff review finder/refuter, security review, bug
diagnosis, bounded implementation) is unavailable until then.

**Why:** dispatching codex during the outage wastes a workflow slot and returns
an error-shaped finding instead of a review; the cc-steer Phase-2 review lost
its finder pass this way.

**How to apply:** until ~2026-07-19 23:10 PT, route codex lanes to fable
(escalation target per CLAUDE.md Models table) or opus xhigh, and delete this
memory once codex works again. A saved unanswered review question sits at
/tmp/codex-review/question.txt. Related: [[codex-security-review-content-filter]].
